name: objective_parameter
description: Objective parameter (such as event name) that is being optimized

name: equal_weighting
description: Whether or not traffic is equally weighted or shifts over time during the experiment

name: variations
description: Variations being tested in the experiment

fields.name: variation_number
fields.description: Variation number

fields.name: variation_name
fields.description: Name of the variation

fields.name: url
fields.description: Url of the variation if this experiment is a url experiment.

fields.name: traffic_percentage
fields.description: Percentage of the traffic this variation is currently receiving

fields.name: original_traffic_percentage
fields.description: Percentage of the traffic the variation originally started out with

fields.name: winner
fields.description: True if this variation has been declared the winner

fields.name: session_count
fields.description: Total sessions for this variation

fields.name: add_to_cart_count
fields.description: Total add to cart count for this variation

fields.name: order_count
fields.description: Total order count for this variation

fields.description: Total initiate checkout count for this variation

fields.name: bounce_count
fields.description: Total bounce count for this variation

fields.name: event_count
fields.description: Total event ocunt for this variation

fields.name: page_view_count
fields.description: Total page view count for this variation

fields.name: duration_seconds_sum
fields.description: Total number of seconds spent on the site for this variation

fields.name: revenue
fields.description: Total revenue for this variation

fields.name: conversion_rate
fields.description: Conversion rate for this variation

fields.name: average_duration_seconds
fields.description: Average duration seconds per session for this variation

fields.name: average_order_value
fields.description: Average order value for this variation

fields.name: average_objective_per_session
fields.description: Average objective value per session for this variation

fields.name: order_item_count
fields.description: Total order item count for this variation

fields.name: daily_statistics
fields.description: Array of daily statistics for this variation

fields.name: stat_dts
fields.description: Date/time that the statistic was created

name: session_count
description: Total number of sessions in the experiment

name: uri
description: URI the experiment was started on

name: container_id
description: Contained ID where the experiment element was located

name: openai_element_type
description: The type of OpenAI element being experimented on

name: openai_total_iterations
description: The total number of iterations to perform on the experiment

name: openai_current_iteration
description: The current iteration of the OpenAI related experiment

name: openai_model
description: The type of OpenAI model used

name: p95_sessions_needed
description: Estimated sessions needed to achieve P95
